title: Shellos and Gastrodon [Cobblemon]
description: Adds Shellos and Gastrodon to Cobblemon.
body:
This Datapack for Cobblemon 1.4 adds the sea slug Pokemon Shellos and Gastrodon to your game.

Look out for west sea Shellos and Gastrodon in warm ocean biomes.
East sea Shellos and Gastrodon can be found in cold ocean biomes.
Both of them will spawn on beaches.

Currently features idle animations for ground and water, as well as walking, swimming, and fainting animations.
Also supports the new cry feature.

Install this addon by putting it into your resourcepack folder and your worlds datapack folder.

Enjoy!
